text.title: GitHub Projects Automation and Issue Templates
text.summary: Built-in workflows, GitHub Actions automation, issue YAML templates, and GraphQL API patterns.

rule.statement: Enable all five built-in workflows first before writing GitHub Actions: item added (→ Backlog), item reopened (→ Todo), item closed (→ Done), PR merged (→ Done), code review requested (→ In Review).
rule.rationale: Built-in workflows are zero-maintenance; GitHub Actions should only be added for logic that built-in workflows cannot express.

section.title: GitHub Actions Automation

rule.statement: Use a dedicated GitHub App (not personal access tokens) for Actions-driven project automation; request permissions: projects:write, issues:write, pull-requests:write explicitly in workflow YAML.
rule.rationale: Personal tokens expire and are tied to individual accounts; GitHub Apps rotate automatically and do not break on person departure. Workflows without explicit permissions fail with 403 silently.

rule.statement: Store the project node ID (PVT_* format) in a repository variable or secret — it never changes, unlike the human-readable project number.
rule.rationale: GraphQL mutations require the node ID; the human-readable number is only used in URLs. Using the wrong identifier causes silent mutation failure.

section.reference: GitHub Actions workflow for project automation

section.title: Issue Templates

rule.statement: Use YAML issue templates (not Markdown) with required fields for problem statement and priority; add projects: ["myorg/1"] to auto-add issues to the project on creation.
rule.rationale: YAML templates enforce required fields at creation time; Markdown templates allow empty submissions. Auto-adding to project on creation ensures no issues are missed in triage.

section.reference: GitHub issue YAML template for feature requests

section.title: GraphQL API

rule.statement: Always resolve issue numbers to ProjectV2Item node IDs before any mutation; implement cursor-based pagination with pageInfo.hasNextPage for all item queries.
rule.rationale: The ProjectV2Item node ID differs from the issue number; passing the wrong ID to a mutation fails silently. Queries without pagination silently return only the first 100 items.

section.reference: GraphQL query to fetch project items with field values
